note: Season 1 (2026 · APAC) intake links. Do not reuse the retired Google Form URLs. Add the current testing intake URL before launch.

requiredFields.label: GitHub username
requiredFields.purpose: Join signup rows to GitHub issue authors in reward export.

appSuiteStudioFeedback.label: 0G App Suite Feedback / 0G Studio Feedback
appSuiteStudioFeedback.note: Required for L0 Recruit. BOTH feedback forms must clear L0; the --l0 list fed to export-reward-report.mjs should contain only testers who completed both.

requiredFields.label: GitHub username
requiredFields.purpose: Same join key as the signup form — lets the L0 completion list be built and reconciled by GitHub username.

privateComputerFeedback.label: 0G Private Computer Feedback
privateComputerFeedback.note: Required for L0 Recruit. BOTH feedback forms must clear L0; a tester counts for L0 only when present in both feedback exports.

requiredFields.label: GitHub username
requiredFields.purpose: Same join key as the signup form — lets the L0 completion list be built and reconciled by GitHub username.

signupExportSchema.label: Signup export schema
signupExportSchema.note: Reward export requires github_username + wallet columns.
